title: Crispy Ukrainian Fried Rice
description: A twist on traditional fried rice, this Ukrainian-inspired dish adds a crispy twist with crunchy toppings.
instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the fried onions and cook for 2 minutes, until crispy.
Add the Ukrainian ricotta and stir to combine.
Add the fried rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Stir in the soy sauce and cook for an additional minute.
Transfer the rice mixture to a serving platter.
Top with crispy rice and a dollop of sour cream.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
Optional: add additional toppings such as diced pickles, chopped hard-boiled eggs, or sliced fresh dill.
